name: Guile India
description:
__Race:__ Human
__Level:__ 2
__Weapon:__ Spike Mace
__Equipment:__ Shield Crest

Guile is one of Mord's loyal companions along with Scott Olds. He mainly follows the orders given to him such as watching over their hostage Hestia, but expressed the desire to go join the others at Mord's duel when they heard loud noises coming from that direction.
